name: @encmind/skill-sdk
description: TypeScript SDK for building EncMind WASM skills

scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const p='./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){console.error('Missing local TypeScript. Run: npm -C sdk/typescript install');process.exit(1)}" && node ./node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc
